entries.source: AI Study Plan Builder For Better Learning
AI Time Travel For Learning History

AI Time Travel For Learning History is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: AI-tijdreizen om geskiedenis te leer is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik om te leer in plaas van passief antwoorde te versamel. Die modus is gebou rondom 'n spesifieke taak: ontvang 'n tijdelijk paspoort, doorloop 'n reisadvies en verken daarna 'n spesifieke historiese samenleving via scène, kaart, tijdlijn, mense, regels, inventaris en bewyse.

entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History: practical guide
entries.value: AI-tijdreizen om geskiedenis te leer: praktiese gids

entries.source: AI Tutor for Parents and Families
AI Writing Coach For Essays And Drafts: practical guide
entries.value: AI-schrijfafrigter vir opstels en konsepte: praktiese gids

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts
entries.value: AI-schrijfafrigter vir opstels, stories en duidelikere konsepte

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Improve essays, stories, emails, and arguments with targeted feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: AI-schrijfafrigter vir opstels, stories en duidelikere konsepte is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik om te leer in plaas van passief antwoorde te versamel. Die modus is gebou rondom 'n spesifieke taak: verbeter opstels, stories, e-mails en argumente met gefokusde terugvoer wat jy eie stem intact laat.

entries.source: AI writing feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: AI-schrijfcommentaar dat jy eie stem intact houdt.

entries.source: All inspir AI learning prompt starters
All public AI learning chats in one clear place.
entries.value: Alle openbare AI-leerchats op een duidelike plek.

entries.source: An AI learning companion should not pretend to be a magic authority. It should not erase uncertainty, replace teachers, or train learners to copy answers. The best systems are honest about limits and clear about the difference between help and handoff.
entries.value: 'n AI-leermaat moet nie doen alsof hy 'n magische autoriteit is. Hy moet onzekerheid nie uitwissen, onderwysers nie vdaarvang en leerders nie trainen om antwoorde te kopieer. Die beste systemen is eerlik oor grenzen en duidelik oor wat verschil tussen hulp en oordrag.

entries.source: An electronic or physical signature of the person authorized to act on behalf of the owner of the copyright’s interest; A description of the copyrighted work that you claim has been infringed, including the URL (i.e., web page address) of the location where the copyrighted work exists or a copy of the copyrighted work; Identification of the URL or other specific location on Service where the material that you claim is infringing is located; Your address, telephone number, and email address; A statement by you that you have a good faith belief that the disputed use is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law; a statement by you, made under penalty of perjury, that the above information in your notice is accurate and that you are the copyright owner or authorized to act on the copyright owner’s behalf.
entries.value: 'n elektronische of fysieke handtekening van die persoon wat bevoegd is om namens die eienaar van wat kopieregbelang te handeel; 'n beschrijving van wat kopieregelijk beschermde werk waarvan jy beweert dat er skending op is gemaakt, insluitend die URL (d.w.z. wat webbladsy-adres) van die locatie waar wat kopieregelijk beschermde werk bestaan of 'n kopie van wat werk; identificatie van die URL of ander spesifieke locatie op Diens waar wat materiaal staat waarvan jy beweert dat wat skending maak; jy adres, telefoonnummer en e-posadres; 'n verklaring van jou dat jy te goeder trouw gelooft dat wat betwiste gebruik nie is toegestaan deur die kopieregeienaar, diens agent of die wet; 'n verklaring van jou, afgelegd op straffe van meineed, dat die bovenstaande inligting in jy kennisgeving reg is en dat jy die kopieregeienaar is of bevoegd is om namens die kopieregeienaar te handeel.

entries.source: an ordinary person affected by the decision;
entries.value: 'n gewone persoon wat deur die besluit word geraakt;

entries.source: Analyze a chart from my textbook
Answer a check question, try a step, debate a claim, revise a draft, or build recall cards.
entries.value: Beantwoord 'n kontrolevraag, probeer 'n stap, debatteer 'n stelling, hersien 'n konsep of bou herroepingskaarte.

entries.source: Answer the active question in your own words
entries.value: Beantwoord die aktiewe vraag in jou eie woorde

entries.source: Answer the learner directly, then offer two possible paths: simpler foundations or deeper exploration.
entries.value: Beantwoord die leerder direk en bied daarna twee mogelijke paden: eenvoudiger basisstof of dieper verkenning.

entries.source: Any contests, sweepstakes or other promotions (collectively, “Promotions”) made available through Service may be governed by rules that are separate from these Terms of Service. If you participate in any Promotions, please review the applicable rules as well as our Privacy Policy. If the rules for a Promotion conflict with these Terms of Service, Promotion rules will apply.
entries.value: Alle wedstrijden, prijsvrae of ander promoties (gesamentlik "Promoties") wat via Diens beskikbaar word gemaakt, kan word beheerst deur regels wat losstaan van hierdie Diensvoorwaardes. As jy deelneemt aan promoties, bekyk dan ook die toepaslike regels en ons Privaatheidsbeleid. As die regels vir 'n promotie botsen met hierdie Diensvoorwaardes, gelden die promotieregels.

entries.source: API, admin, reset, private utility, and private saved-chat surfaces are not public source content.
entries.value: API-, admin-, reset-, private utility- en privé gestoor chatoppervlakken is geen openbare broninhoud.

entries.source: Applied AI learning work before the current AI wave.
entries.value: Toegepast AI-leerwerk vóór die huidige AI-golf.

entries.source: apply a concept to a small example.
entries.value: pas 'n konsep by op 'n klein voorbeeld.

entries.source: Apply the idea to a new example.
entries.value: Pas die idee by op 'n nuwe voorbeeld.

entries.source: Are audience pages public and indexable?
Are private saved user conversations exposed to search?
entries.value: Worden privé gestoor gebruikersgesprekken blootgesteld aan soekenjins?

entries.source: Are the articles connected to live AI learning tools?
entries.value: Is die artikelen verbonden met lewendig AI-leerhulpmiddels?

entries.source: Are these pages saying inspir replaces every learning platform?
entries.value: Zeggen hierdie bladsye dat inspir elke leerplatform vdaarvang?

entries.source: Are these pages written only for search engines?
entries.value: Is hierdie bladsye net vir soekenjins geskryf?

entries.source: Are these prompts just for ChatGPT?
entries.value: Is hierdie prompts net vir ChatGPT?

entries.source: Are these real public pages or just app screens?
entries.value: Is hierdie regte openbare bladsye of net app-schermen?

entries.source: Are these workflows free to try?
entries.value: Is hierdie werkvloeie gratis te probeer?

entries.source: Argue both sides and sharpen thinking
entries.value: Argumenteer beide kante en slyp jou denke

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, and what makes an image powerful.
entries.value: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik om te leer in plaas van passief antwoorde te versamel. Die modus is gebou rondom 'n spesifieke taak: verken kunswerken, style, kunsenas, visuele keuses en wat 'n beeld krachtig maak.

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode: praktiese gids

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompts en studielus vir Art Appreciation Guide

entries.source: Articles, mode guides, and prompt loops
Ask about goals, deadlines, available time, and current confidence.
entries.value: Vra na doelwitte, sperdatums, beschikbare tijd en huidig vertroue.

entries.source: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Vra enige vraag en leer deur duidelike verduidelikings, voorbeelde, opvolg-aanwysings, en geduldige KI-onderrig.

entries.source: Ask audience, metric, risks, and how to include improvement.
entries.value: Vra na teikengroep, metric, risico's en hoe verbetering moet word meegenomen.

entries.source: Ask Code Tutor for the simplest mental model, one example, and one thing beginners often misunderstand.
entries.value: Vra Code Tutor om die eenvoudigste mentale model, een voorbeeld en een ding dat beginners dikwels verkeerd begrijpen.

entries.source: Ask current routine, target habit, and easiest daily version.
entries.value: Vra na die huidige roetine, doelgewoonte en makkelijkste dagelijkse versie.

entries.source: Ask follow-ups, evaluate accuracy and confidence, correct gaps, and retry.
entries.value: Stel vervolgvrae, beoordeel nauwkeurigheid en vertroue, corrigeer hiaten en probeer weer.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: Vra om 'n wenk, laat die leerder die volgende stap verduidelik en gebruik daarna 'n vasvra of flitskaart om te kontroleer of die idee is bly hangen.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, not the answer
entries.value: Vra vir 'n wenk, nie die antwoord nie

entries.source: Ask for a hint, question, or step check before the answer.
entries.value: Vra om 'n wenk, vraag of stapkontrole vóór die antwoord.

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: Vra om 'n wenk. Vra nog nie om wat definitieve antwoord.

entries.source: Ask for a misconception check, a short retrieval question, or a harder example. Answer before asking the AI to correct you.
entries.value: Vra om 'n wanopvattingskontrole, 'n kort ophaalvraag of 'n moeilijker voorbeeld. Antwoord voordat jy die AI vra jy te corrigeren.

entries.source: Ask for a simpler explanation of the weakest concept.
entries.value: Vra vir 'n eenvoudiger verduideliking van die swakste konsep.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Vra om 'n klein eerste stap in plaas van 'n definitief antwoord.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step.
Ask for a tiny first task.
Ask for a topic, level, or word list; then introduce a small set.
entries.value: Vra om 'n onderwerp, vlak of woordelijst; introduceer daarna 'n klein set.

entries.source: Ask for artwork/style or provide a looking framework.
entries.value: Vra om kunswerk/stijl of gee 'n kijkkader.

entries.source: Ask for assignment names, due dates, effort, and current status.
entries.value: Vra om taaknamen, sperdatums, inspanning en huidige status.

entries.source: Ask for audience, goal, and draft status if unclear; then give focused feedback.
entries.value: Vra om teikengroep, doel en conceptstatus as wat onduidelik is; gee daarna gefokusde terugvoer.

entries.source: Ask for author, title, date, publisher, URL, and access date when needed.
entries.value: Vra om outeur, titel, datum, uitgewer, URL en toegangsdatum wanneer nodig.

entries.source: Ask for available time, must-do tasks, and energy level.
entries.value: Vra om beschikbare tijd, verplige take en energieniveau.

entries.source: Ask for commitment, partner/context, check-in frequency, and proof.
entries.value: Vra om commitment, vennoot/context, kontrole-infrequentie en bewyse.

entries.source: Ask for domain and difficulty, then set the case brief and first decision.
entries.value: Vra om domein en moeilijkheidsgraad, stel daarna die gevalbrief en eerste besluitslissing op.

entries.source: Ask for event and depth, then separate background causes from immediate triggers.
entries.value: Vra om gebeurtenis en diepgaanng, scheid daarna achtergrondoorzaken van directe aanleidingen.

entries.source: Ask for exam date, syllabus, available time, and confidence by topic.
entries.value: Vra om examendatum, syllabus, beschikbare tijd en vertroue per onderwerp.

entries.source: Ask for five questions that mix definitions, examples, and transfer problems.
entries.value: Vra vir vyf vrae wat definisies, voorbeelde en oordragprobleme meng.

entries.source: Ask for format, time limit, and audience; then begin a practice round.
entries.value: Vra om format, tijdslimiet en teikengroep; begin daarna 'n oefenronde.

entries.source: Ask for goal, constraints, and desired vibe; then offer a varied idea set.
entries.value: Vra om doel, beperkings en gewenste vibe; bied daarna 'n gevarieerde set idees.

entries.source: Ask for goal, timeline, tasks, and what counts as real progress.
entries.value: Vra om doel, tijdlijn, take en wat as regte voortgaanng telt.

entries.source: Ask for grading scale, weights, current scores, and target.
entries.value: Vra om beoordelingsschaal, wegingen, huidige scores en doel.

entries.source: Ask for group size, goal, duration, and check-in cadence.
entries.value: Vra om groepsgrootte, doel, duur en kontrole-inritme.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: Vra om wenke, kontroles en terugvoer voordat jy om 'n uitgewerkt antwoord vra.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, feedback, and study plans that keep the thinking with the learner.
entries.value: Vra vir wenke, kontroles, terugvoer en studieplanne wat die denkwerk by die leerder hou.

entries.source: Ask for language, goal, and code/error if relevant.
entries.value: Vra om taal, doel en kode/fout as dat relevant is.

entries.source: Ask for language, learner level, and scenario; then start in character.
entries.value: Vra om taal, vlak van die leerder en scenario; begin daarna in karakter.

entries.source: Ask for material, deadline, and prior confidence.
entries.value: Vra om materiaal, sperdatum en eerder vertroue.

entries.source: Ask for one revision priority, not a finished replacement.
entries.value: Vra om een revisieprioriteit, nie om 'n afgewerkte vdaarvanging.

entries.source: Ask for one small task before asking for the answer.
entries.value: Vra om een klein taak voordat jy om die antwoord vra.

entries.source: Ask for one structural priority instead of a full rewrite.
entries.value: Vra om een structurele prioriteit in plaas van 'n volledige herschrijving.

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: Vra om kaarte met een idee, wenke en veelvoorkomde valkuilen.

entries.source: Ask for outcome, duration, distractions, and starting state.
entries.value: Vra om uitkomst, duur, afleidingen en beginsituatie.

entries.source: Ask for place or theme, then orient with location, scale, and key features.
entries.value: Vra om plek of tema, oriënteer daarna met locatie, schaal en kernkenmerken.

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: Vra om voorkennis, 'n eenvoudig model, voorbeelde en 'n veelvoorkomde wanopvatting.

entries.source: Ask for research goal, level, and available sources.
entries.value: Vra om navorsingsdoel, vlak en beschikbare bronne.

entries.source: Ask for role, audience, and background; then run a first question.
entries.value: Vra om rol, teikengroep en achtergrond; stel daarna 'n eerste vraag.

entries.source: Ask for source material and pair type.
Ask for source material or topic and target difficulty.
entries.value: Vra om bronmateriaal of onderwerp en gewenste moeilijkheid.

entries.source: Ask for source material, topic, and target detail if missing.
entries.value: Vra om bronmateriaal, onderwerp en gewenste detaillering as wat ontbreken.

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: Vra om terugvoer op struktuur, bewyse en helderheid terwyl die finale konsep van jou bly.
